verses.1: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son makes a father glad, But a foolish son is a grief to his mother.
verses.2: Ill-gotten gains do not benefit, But righteousness rescues from death.
verses.3: The LORD will not allow the righteous to hunger, But He will reject the craving of the wicked.
verses.4: Poor is one who works with a lazy hand, But the hand of the diligent makes rich.
verses.5: He who gathers in summer is a son who acts wisely, But he who sleeps in harvest is a son who acts shamefully.
verses.6: Blessings are on the head of the righteous, But the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.
verses.7: The mentioning of the righteous is a blessing, But the name of the wicked will rot.
verses.8: The wise of heart will receive commands, But a babbling fool will come to ruin.
verses.9: One who walks in integrity walks securely, But one who perverts his ways will be found out.
verses.10: He who winks the eye causes trouble, And a babbling fool will come to ruin.
verses.11: The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life, But the mouth of the wicked conceals violence.
verses.12: Hatred stirs up strife, But love covers all offenses.
verses.13: On the lips of the discerning, wisdom is found, But a rod is for the back of him who has no sense.
verses.14: Wise people store up knowledge, But with the mouth of the foolish, ruin is at hand.
verses.15: The rich person’s wealth is his fortress, The ruin of the poor is their poverty.
verses.16: The wages of the righteous is life, The income of the wicked, punishment.
verses.17: One who is on the path of life follows instruction, But one who ignores a rebuke goes astray.
verses.18: One who conceals hatred has lying lips, And one who spreads slander is a fool.
verses.19: When there are many words, wrongdoing is unavoidable, But one who restrains his lips is wise.
verses.20: The tongue of the righteous is like choice silver, The heart of the wicked is worth little.
verses.21: The lips of the righteous feed many, But fools die for lack of understanding.
verses.22: It is the blessing of the LORD that makes rich, And He adds no sorrow to it.
verses.23: Doing wickedness is like sport to a fool, And so is wisdom to a person of understanding.
verses.24: What the wicked fears will come upon him, But the desire of the righteous will be granted.
verses.25: When the whirlwind passes, the wicked is no more, But the righteous has an everlasting foundation.
verses.26: Like vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes, So is the lazy one to those who send him.
verses.27: The fear of the LORD prolongs life, But the years of the wicked will be shortened.
verses.28: The hope of the righteous is gladness, But the expectation of the wicked perishes.
verses.29: The way of the LORD is a stronghold for the upright, But ruin to the workers of injustice.
verses.30: The righteous will never be shaken, But the wicked will not live in the land.
verses.31: The mouth of the righteous flows with wisdom, But the perverted tongue will be cut out.
verses.32: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable, But the mouth of the wicked, what is perverted.
